treaty.title: China-Netherlands Tax Treaty
notes: v2 is article-centered rather than result-centered
The current MVP keeps one base rule per supported article

articles.summary: Defines treaty treatment for dividends between the two jurisdictions.
articles.source_excerpt: Dividend treatment is governed by Article 10, subject to treaty conditions and factual qualification.
notes: Beneficial ownership and factual qualification may matter.

conditions: Treaty applicability depends on the facts of the payment.
rate_rules.review_reason: Final eligibility depends on facts beyond v1 scope.

articles.summary: Defines treaty treatment for interest between the two jurisdictions.
articles.source_excerpt: Interest treatment is governed by Article 11, subject to treaty conditions and factual qualification.
notes: Beneficial ownership and factual qualification may matter.

conditions: Treaty applicability depends on the facts of the payment.
rate_rules.review_reason: Final eligibility depends on facts beyond v1 scope.

articles.summary: Defines treaty treatment for royalties between the two jurisdictions.
articles.source_excerpt: Royalty treatment is governed by Article 12, subject to treaty conditions and factual qualification.
notes: Beneficial ownership and factual qualification may matter.

conditions: Treaty applicability depends on the facts of the payment.
rate_rules.review_reason: Final eligibility depends on facts beyond v1 scope.
